controlNotes: The SQ-5 has a fully parametric 4-band PEQ plus HPF/LPF per channel. Access by selecting the channel strip, then tapping the PEQ tab on the touchscreen. The dedicated Processing Knob controls the selected parameter. Long-press a band button to reset to defaults.

instructionTemplates.selectChannel: Touch CH {channel} on the touchscreen to bring up its processing strip
instructionTemplates.openEQ: Tap the PEQ tab in the processing section on the touchscreen
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: Tap the HPF button to enable it, then tap the HPF frequency and use the Processing Knob to set {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Tap the {band} circle on the PEQ display, then use the Processing Knob to sweep to {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.setBandGain: With {band} selected, rotate the Processing Knob to set gain to {amount}dB
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: Press the SAVE button or store to the current scene via the Scenes menu.
